summary.lv: Ubiquiti Latvia meklē QA Automation Engineer (JavaScript), kurš veiks automatizētu testēšanu, identificēs kļūdas un uzturēs testu skriptus. Darbs klātienē Rīgā, atalgojums €2500–5000 mēnesī.
summary.en: Ubiquiti Latvia is seeking a QA Automation Engineer (JavaScript) to perform automated testing, identify bugs, and maintain test scripts in an on-site role in Riga, offering €2,500–5,000/month.
